# UIListContentConfiguration.TextProperties.TextTransform.none

**Case**

The text doesn’t have a transform.

## Declaration

```swift
case none
```

## Text transforms

- **UIListContentConfiguration.TextProperties.TextTransform.capitalized**: Displays the text with the first character capitalized.
- **UIListContentConfiguration.TextProperties.TextTransform.lowercase**: Displays the text in all lowercase characters.
- **UIListContentConfiguration.TextProperties.TextTransform.uppercase**: Displays the text in all uppercase characters.
